body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-4324", "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "A flaw was found in the Katello plugin for Red Hat Satellite. This vulnerability, caused by improper sanitization of user-provided input, allows a remote attacker to inject arbitrary SQL commands into the sort_by parameter of the /api/hosts/bootc_images API endpoint. This can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS) by triggering database errors, and potentially enable Boolean-based Blind SQL injection, which could allow an attacker to extract sensitive information from the database.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00262, "percentile": 0.17578}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fwj4-6wgp-mpxm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-18T17:25:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fwj4-6wgp-mpxm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fwj4-6wgp-mpxm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-4324"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-17T14:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-03-17T15:36:23Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4324", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-4324", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2448349", "https://github.com/Katello/katello/commit/a0a793b08d4f0a897ee985d79a687ad043f99e57", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:5968", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:5970", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:22326", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fwj4-6wgp-mpxm"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Katello/katello", "summary": "Katello: Denial of Service and potential information disclosure via SQL injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-01T21:30:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fwj4-6wgp-mpxm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.19.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "katello"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.19.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
